channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Grass verge on Barnesdale Crescent needs cutting, 9th April
item.description:
The grass is very long, not cut since last September

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Friar Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 9th April
item.description:
There has been a large amount of rubbish dumped. Looks like an old shed which has been taken apart perhaps.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lincoln Green Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wood dumped on grass area, 9th April
item.description:
Please remove flytip on grass area.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravensworth Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass verge on Robin Hood Green needs cutting, 9th April
item.description:
The verge is getting very long, hasn't been cut since last September. Rubbish and dog mess is buried and easily trodden in.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Robin Hood Green, Ramsden, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hearing South - Outside the take away shops after Hiaal supermarket, 9th April
item.description:
The pavement is very greasy outside places like Nando’s and other take away shops. I nearly slipped yesterday. It’s all down the pavement in that block where it’s just fast food shops. Perhaps it’s grease from their bins. The pavements all down the Kilburn high road between Brondesbury and Kilburn stations are really disgusting and need the council to clean them. They are slippery and the area stinks of urine.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn High Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 229 Kilburn High Road on the corner of Burton Road and Kilburn High Road, 9th April
item.description:
A sofa has been dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burton Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Dumped rubbish bag, 9th April
item.description:
Full of beer cans and other things. Been there for weeks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 46, Doveney Close, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Highbanks Close, East Wickham, Greater London

item.title: Outside 241 Waterloo Passage rear of Kilburn High Road, 9th April
item.description:
A folding chair has been dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burton Road, London

item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: 2 ft pothole on Clifton rd, jn northcote rd, 9th April

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clifton Road, Longlands, Greater London

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Framlingham Crescent, Elmstead, Greater London

item.title: Silly people, 9th April
item.description:
Please get on top of this before it comes out of hand and people start ripping bags apart as they’ve already done

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hertford Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish all over pavement, 9th April
item.description:
We need a litter campaign!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27a, Half Moon Lane, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog constantly found in nunhead playground, 9th April
item.description:
There has been more and more dog poo being found in nunhead playground. This is a big safety concern.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nunhead Green, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tarmacked paving stones, 9th April
item.description:
Thames Water dug up the street, including new paving stones, and replaced with ugly tarmac. It looks awful. Please ask them to relay the paving stones, which were laid as part of the levelling-up project. Thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albion Way, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing public bin, 9th April
item.description:
Bin needs emptying. Stuffed full of litter and now overflowing onto pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Avenue, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin needs emptying, 9th April
item.description:
Overflowing bin

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danson Mead, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 9th April
item.description:
Baby dead fox place in shoe box and bin bag due to flies and children walking past, now outside 34/36 Lynton Avenue
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41, Lynton Avenue, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bins, 9th April
item.description:
These have been here for about two months. Please collect. Thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albion Way, Hither Green, Greater London
